rules.uniqueness: Each interactionId must appear once. Add variants inside the existing component spec.
rules.signature: Dhiraj components use the shared token and motion specs; project taste can add content/assets later.

components.purpose: Stable page frame. Desktop: Sidebar Nav (240-280px). Mobile: Bottom Tab Bar or Drawer. Includes Skip Link.
components.visual: Dense SaaS layout (Linear style). Hairline borders. Radius 8px. Clear content bands.

components.purpose: Primary orientation and route/action surface.
components.visual: Sticky optional, translucent only when readability holds, compact links, one primary action.

components.purpose: First viewport signal for product/person/place/object with strong typography and clear action.
components.visual: Editorial headline, concise supporting copy, action row, proof/meta strip, and optional media slot.

components.purpose: Reusable section rhythm with eyebrow, heading, copy, optional aside/media/content grid.
components.visual: Full-width band or unframed constrained section; no floating page-section cards.

components.purpose: Command/action trigger with icon support and stable dimensions.
components.visual: 8px radius max, clear contrast, icon+text only for commands, stable min-height.

components.purpose: Reusable content/action surface for a single object.
components.visual: Subtle hairline border, 8px radius max, no card-inside-card nesting.

components.purpose: Feature/capability layout with responsive, scannable hierarchy.
components.visual: Mixed span grid at desktop, single column on mobile, one dominant tile only.

components.purpose: Validated accessible data entry.
components.visual: Label-first fields, inline errors, clear submit state, toast only as secondary feedback.

components.purpose: Accessible modal and mobile sheet behavior.
components.visual: Dialog centered on desktop, sheet mode on mobile, focus handled by Radix.

components.purpose: Small-set view switching.
components.visual: Segmented control feel with visible selected state and keyboard navigation.

components.purpose: Contextual help, lightweight details, and icon affordance labels.
components.visual: Tooltip for labels/help; popover for interactive content; never hide critical instructions only in tooltip.

components.purpose: Non-blocking feedback for save/sync/success/undo.
components.visual: Bottom-right desktop, bottom mobile, crisp border, short actionable copy.

components.purpose: Async and zero-data states for every data-backed UI.
components.visual: Useful next action, not decorative emptiness. Skeletons only where layout is known.

components.purpose: Clear next step after value/proof.
components.visual: One primary action, one secondary action at most, compact copy.

components.purpose: Offer comparison and conversion surface.
components.visual: Clear plan hierarchy, feature comparison, one highlighted recommendation.

components.purpose: Trust/proof content with person/company attribution.
components.visual: Short quote, visible attribution, no fake decorative review clutter.

components.purpose: Secondary navigation, legal, and contact/proof links.
components.visual: Quiet, structured, scannable; never a second hero.

components.purpose: Placeholder shapes matching expected content layout during data fetching.
components.visual: Gray shapes matching final content dimensions. Shimmer gradient animation via CSS. Reduced-motion: static gray blocks without shimmer. Must prevent CLS.

components.purpose: Infinitely scrolling horizontal strip for logos, testimonials, or text as social proof.
components.visual: CSS animation with requestAnimationFrame fallback. Pause on hover. Reduced-motion: static grid or single row. No GSAP needed for basic marquee.

components.purpose: Global search/action modal triggered by keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K).
components.visual: Centered modal with search input, categorized results, recent items. Focus trap via Radix Dialog. Keyboard navigation for results. Escape to close.

components.purpose: High-engagement command trigger that physically follows the cursor when inside hover bounds.
components.visual: Dampened translation based on bounding client coordinates. Smooth lerped return to center on cursor exit.

components.purpose: Interactive surface that rotates in 3D perspective space based on cursor coordinates relative to its center.
components.visual: Perspective wrapper, will-change: transform, rotateX/Y spring-dampened to prevent coordinate jitter.

components.purpose: SaaS card surface featuring a subtle glowing radial background mask tracking cursor coordinates.
components.visual: Parent container updating --mouse-x and --mouse-y CSS properties. Pseudo-element with radial-gradient mask.

components.purpose: Accessible accordion collapsible panels with fluid height-expanding content sections.
components.visual: Hairline border separators, chevrons animating 180deg, focus ring around triggers, no page jump on expand.

components.purpose: Segmented navigational controls sharing a single active background pill indicator sliding smoothly on click.
components.visual: Relative button triggers inside absolute container frame. Slide pill using Framer Motion layoutId.

components.purpose: Mobile-native interactive dialog wrapper snapping to sheet height snap-points and drag to dismiss.
components.visual: Bottom sheet anchor, backdrop blur, grab handle indicator, snap boundary damping.

components.purpose: Visual comparison surface with a sliding divider to crop overlapping before/after images.
components.visual: Dual layered identical sizing wrappers, top wrapper clipped horizontally relative to cursor percentage slider.
